checkin.journal:
It's an interesting day, so on one hand I have a lot of positive news, and on the other hand, there are some challenges. But in general, I was able to take on the day pretty well considering how poor my sleep was. I even had a little exercising session in the morning, and I feel like the morning walk (the half an hour without a phone) is also doing really good on my mental health. So keep on doing that.
